---
applyTo: "sites/**"
---

# Web Reality Fabricator Context — Auto-loaded

When editing any file under `sites/` you are working on a fabricated digital artifact that must feel authentically aged and institutionally real. Every edit either adds historical gravity or erodes it.

## Site Era Targets — Match These Exactly

| Site | Era | Style |
|---|---|---|
| `sites/somnatek/` | 2009–2013 | Institutional clinic, float layout, system fonts, skeuomorphic era |
| `sites/restwell/` | 2008–2011 | phpBB-era patient forum, table layout, forum conventions |
| `sites/wexler/` | 2012 | University research repository, dry academic, text-heavy |
| `sites/harrow-county/` | Late 2000s | Government records, plain HTML, minimal styling |

## Somnatek Time Layer — Current Discovery State

Players arrive after the 2014 collapse. The site should feel:
- Not updated since approximately 2014
- Staff photo missing (Ellison), cert dates misaligned (Ortiz)
- Copyright stale, footer unchanged
- Some links lead to 404, some PDFs have anomalous ModDates
- No "now hiring," no "schedule an appointment," no active CTA

## Realism Checklist for Every Public Page Edit

- [ ] Copyright year is ≤ 2014 or absent
- [ ] No modern CSS framework syntax
- [ ] System fonts only (Georgia, Verdana, Arial, Tahoma, Courier New)
- [ ] No flexbox or CSS grid (use floats and tables)
- [ ] Phone format consistent: (404) XXX-XXXX
- [ ] Address consistent: 465 Upper Riverdale Road, Suite 2, Harrow County, GA 30274
- [ ] No active CTAs that imply the clinic is operating
- [ ] Any staff references match known employment timeline anomalies

## Anomaly Placement Rules

- Anomalies go inside boring content, not beside it
- One wrong thing per page is more powerful than several
- Source code clues (HTML comments, `data-` attributes, metadata) must read as system artifacts, not developer notes
- Never place an anomaly where no reasonable person would look
- Forum posts and cached versions are the most credible anomaly containers

## Forbidden on Public Pages

- Horror aesthetics or imagery
- Obvious ARG language
- Modern font imports (Google Fonts)
- Responsive breakpoints that look contemporary
- Any active service language ("book now," "call today," "we're open")

## Example Prompts

- "Build the RestWell forum homepage — phpBB 2009 era, mostly mundane sleep advice categories, one thread title that shouldn't be there"
- "Write the Wexler University faculty page for Dr. Edwin Vale — what's present, what's conspicuously missing, what does the employment timeline imply"
- "Create a 2011 cached snapshot version of the Somnatek homepage showing what it looked like before the collapse-era changes"
- "Write a Harrow County Gazette blotter item from October 2014 that mentions the Somnatek closure in three unremarkable sentences"
- "Design the Harrow County business license record for Somnatek — what anomalies would a careful player find in the filing dates or registered agent history"
